title: wakeful's no scroll wheel mod
description: Disables scroll wheel input. Useful for speedrunners who accidentally change hotbar slots while scrolling.
body:
### wakeful's disable scrool wheel mod
- Intergration with Speedrun API for ease of config when speedrunning
- Intergration with Mod Menu for more casual players

**ALTHOUGH THIS MOD WAS ORIGINALLY MEANT FOR SPEEDRUNNERS, THIS MOD IS NOT WHITELISTED AND COULD GET YOUR RUN INVALITDATED**
